negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_118
prompt: The video opens with a serene coastal scene, featuring a vast expanse of ocean meeting a sandy beach under a partly cloudy sky. The waves are moderate in size, creating a frothy white foam as they break against the shore. On the right side of the frame, a steep, rugged cliff dominates the landscape, its dark brown and green tones suggesting a mix of earthy textures and vegetation. In the distance, additional cliffs and landmasses are visible, adding depth to the horizon. A few figures can be seen on the beach, possibly surfers or beachgoers, adding life to the tranquil setting.  As the video progresses, a surfer appears in the left portion of the frame, initially positioned further out in the water. The surfer maintains a steady posture, adjusting their position to navigate the incoming waves. The surfer successfully rides one wave, maintaining balance and control while gliding along the face of the wave. As the sequence continues, the surfer encounters another wave, which they ride smoothly before eventually losing balance and falling into the water. The scene captures the dynamic interaction between the surfer and the powerful ocean waves, highlighting both the thrill and challenges of surfing.  In the final frame, the surfer is no longer visible, having fallen off the wave. The waves continue to crash onto the shore, creating a continuous frothy white foam. The steep, rugged cliff remains prominent on the right side of the frame, and the distant landmasses are still visible in the background. The overall scene retains its serene coastal ambiance, with the waves and the cliff providing a striking backdrop to the earlier surfing activity.
